name: NorZinc Ltd.
description: NorZinc Ltd. is a Canadian-based exploration and development mining company focused on the development of its key asset, the 100%-owned Prairie Creek Project, a high-grade zinc-lead-silver property located in the Northwest Territories, Canada. The company aims to become a clean, safe, and sustainable producer of high-grade zinc, lead, and silver concentrates, working closely with local Indigenous communities and maintaining high environmental standards.
